Machine Service Status

Current hours, next service, remaining hours, summed oils, and repeated filters.

Machine Oils and Filters History

Select a machine to view summed oils and filters for that machine.

Plant List

Add plants once, then update current machine hours daily.

Update Machine Hours

Service / Breakdown Capture

Choose what you want to capture on this tab. Service Report is the normal mechanic report. Log Breakdown is only to open a new breakdown before it is fixed.

Log Breakdown

Log the machine breakdown first. It stays open until a mechanic opens it and saves a Breakdown report to rectify it.

Breakdown Photos

Add photos while logging the breakdown. Photos are compressed on this device and included in the Breakdown Log PDF.

Log Maintenance Item

Log maintenance issues that do not stop the machine. These do not start downtime. They stay open until rectified by a Maintenance report.

Maintenance Photos

Add photos while logging the maintenance item. Photos are compressed on this device and included in the Maintenance Item PDF.

Service Report

Rectifying logged breakdown(s)
Rectifying maintenance item(s)

Service Personal details

Equipment Details

Plant number is taken from the Hours list. Press Sync to download the latest Google Sheets data first, then upload your pending local changes. Select plant number first. Machine type and machine model will auto-fill only from the selected plant number. Current hours from the selected machine will auto-fill into Service hours for smoother capture.

Filters

Oil Usage

Breakdowns / Delays

Work Done / Additional Notes

Mechanic Signature

Sign once on this phone. The saved signature will auto-load for the same mechanic on future reports.

Report Photos

Add photos for this report. Photos are compressed on this device and printed inside the PDF report.
Normal reports keep photos in a compact 2 x 2 grid. Breakdown reports can print each photo on its own full photo page.

All Reports

Connection

Connection URL is locked in this app.
On app open, it downloads latest server data. Manual Sync uploads pending changes first, then refreshes latest Google Sheets data.

Scan Machine QR Code

Scan a QR code containing the plant number, or a URL/text with plant=PLANTNO. Manual QR entry is disabled.
